next_experiment: Construct and certify a factor-sensitive Type II statistic not measurable with respect to any finite congruence transcript, then transfer positivity to gap two.
claim_boundary: No conjecture proof and no certified conjecture counterexample.
proof_boundary: The theorem refutes transcript admissibility as a sufficient primality certificate; a classifier impossibility claim additionally requires a prime and composite realizer in the same transcript. It neither constructs a Twin Prime counterexample nor proves infinitely many twin primes. Non-modular analytic correlations remain outside the theorem.
